  "findings": [
    "Personnel are positioned within the swing radius of active heavy equipment, creating an immediate struck-by hazard."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately halt all equipment operations in the affected area.",
    "Establish a physical barricade or warning line to isolate the swing radius of the equipment.",
    "Instruct all personnel to remain outside the barricaded zone while the equipment is in operation.",
    "Appoint a dedicated spotter to monitor the swing radius and maintain communication with the operator."
  ],
  "rationale": "Personnel standing within the swing radius of active heavy machinery poses an immediate, life-threatening struck-by hazard. This violates basic safety protocols and OSHA standards, requiring an immediate stop-work order and the implementation of physical barricades and spotters.",
  "references": [
    "OSHA 1926 Subpart O",
    "OSHA 1926.601",
    "OSHA 1926.21(b)(2)"
  ]
}
